## Meeting Purpose

[Review initial content for Thiago da Costa's LinkedIn and discuss ongoing content strategy with Napa team.](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content was well-received; Thiago wants to inject more personality and metrics](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Process: Weekly content batches, voice notes for ideas, biweekly calls](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Focus on overcoming challenges, not current struggles](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Explore "vulnerable" posts about career experiences](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
  - [Balance transparency with protecting sensitive business information](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)

## Topics

### Content Review and Feedback

  - [Thiago found the content authentic and aligned with his voice](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Suggested starting posts with metrics or numbers for better performance](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Liked the storytelling approach, especially in humorous posts](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Wants to explore more "vulnerable" posts about career experiences](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)

### Content Strategy and Process

  - [Weekly content batches prepared a week in advance](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Communication via Slack, voice messages, and biweekly calls](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Napa team handles scheduling; Thiago reviews in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [Balance between sharing metrics and protecting sensitive information](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Focus on overcoming past challenges rather than current struggles](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

### Audience Growth and Content Evolution

  - [Content strategy adapts as audience grows and business goals change](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [Example: Shifting focus from user signups to fundraising to hiring](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Importance of keeping Napa team updated on current business priorities](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Research based on existing materials, interviews, and industry trends](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Aim to capture Thiago's authentic voice and thought process](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
  - [Utilize various content types: serious thought leadership, hot takes, video, infographics](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)

### Graphics and Visual Content

  - [Napa can create basic-level graphics](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Can work with existing design language or use Canva for simple visuals](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Thiago to review content in Google Slides and leave comments](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Schedule first biweekly call and begin weekly content batch process](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Explore ideas for "vulnerable" posts about Thiago's career experiences](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [Napa team to incorporate feedback and refine content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/kNBijZxbGXqNpgfvKgt13PVA7UrBY8rV?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
